_comment: Cached Instagram Reel used as the demo kill-switch when Apify is unavailable or USE_FIXTURES=true. Replace with a freshly scraped reel for your own demo (see backend/fixtures/README.md). This is cached INPUT data, not hard-coded output.
title: 3 morning habits that changed my productivity
creator: thefocusedfounder

transcript_segments.text: Stop hitting snooze. I'm serious — these three habits doubled my output.
Habit one: I write down my single most important task the night before, not in the morning.
When you wake up, decision fatigue is real. Removing that one choice changes everything.
Habit two: no phone for the first hour. The world can wait sixty minutes, I promise.
I replaced doom scrolling with ten minutes of writing and a short walk outside.
Habit three: I time-box deep work into a single ninety minute block before any meetings.
Ninety minutes of focus beats eight hours of being constantly interrupted.
Try one of these tomorrow and comment which one. Follow for more founder systems.
